KHAS URAP Continues Its Rise in 2023-2024 Türkiye Rankings

The

“URAP Turkish Universities Ranking 2023-2024

” lists, prepared annually by the

University Ranking by Academic Performance (URAP)

Research Laboratory operating within METU using data from the Web of Science and InCites databases, have been published.

Our university is in the URAP Turkish University Rankings for the 2023-2024 period,

Ranking 65th among 188 universities and 14th among 65 foundation universities

It continued its rise in the URAP rankings.

You can access the 2023-2024 URAP Turkish University Rankings

here.
